prs.title: Update Docker Images
prs.author: app/red-hat-konflux
prs.diff_excerpt:
diff --git a/Dockerfile b/Dockerfile
index e2e84d7..f27037d 100644
--- a/Dockerfile
+++ b/Dockerfile
@@ -9,7 +9,7 @@ RUN go mod edit -godebug=fips140=auto && \
     GOFIPS140=v1.0.0 go build -tags=no_openssl -buildvcs=false -o rhtas_console ./cmd/rhtas_console
 
 # Final stage
-FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal:9.8-1782797275
+FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal:9.8-1784705586
 
 # Set a writable working directory
 WORKDIR /tmp
diff --git a/Dockerfile.rh b/Dockerfile.rh
index 3dec554..43516d8 100644
--- a/Dockerfile.rh
+++ b/Dockerfile.rh
@@ -1,5 +1,5 @@
 # Build stage
-FROM registry.redhat.io/ubi9/go-toolset:9.8-1784076237@sha256:dba8f7f9cc231f4729be36df146684940d2517bab9721f8f90c246915e190a9a AS builder
+FROM registry.redhat.io/ubi9/go-toolset:9.8-1784751462@sha256:682936361f1559a49c23d8bad3fcd534dca1f35e3f092a766dbe72dd6a12beab AS builder
 
 WORKDIR /app
 
@@ -11,7 +11,7 @@ RUN go mod edit -godebug=fips140=auto && \
     GOFIPS140=v1.0.0 go build -tags=no_openssl -buildvcs=false -o rhtas_console ./cmd/rhtas_console
 
 # Final stage
-FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal@sha256:463cae32c6f6f5594b11a5c22de275016bd8545ce58a6373388e8b24f13fc15c
+FROM registry.access.redhat.com/ubi9/ubi-minimal@sha256:2e8edce823a48e51858f1fad3ff4cbf6875ce8a3f86b9eecf298bc2050c8652a
 
 # Set a writable working directory
 WORKDIR /tmp

prs.title: :ghost: bump actions/checkout from 6 to 7
prs.author: app/dependabot
prs.diff_excerpt:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci-image-build.yaml b/.github/workflows/ci-image-build.yaml
index c8cba5e..aed1c8f 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci-image-build.yaml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci-image-build.yaml
@@ -12,7 +12,7 @@ jobs:
       should-test: ${{ steps.check-changes.outputs.should-test }}
 
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v7
 
       - name: What files changed?
         id: changed
@@ -80,7 +80,7 @@ jobs:
 
     steps:
       - name: Checkout merge commit for PR${{ github.event.pull_request.number }}
-        uses: actions/checkout@v6
+        uses: actions/checkout@v7
 
       - name: Setup QEMU to be able to build on ${{ matrix.architecture }}
         if: ${{ matrix.architecture != 'amd64' }}
diff --git a/.github/workflows/ci.yaml b/.github/workflows/ci.yaml
index a5cd8b8..2ced2e4 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/ci.yaml
+++ b/.github/workflows/ci.yaml
@@ -15,7 +15,7 @@ jobs:
   ci:
     runs-on: ubuntu-latest
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v7
       - name: Use Node.js
         uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
diff --git a/.github/workflows/conformance-monitor.yml b/.github/workflows/conformance-monitor.yml
index aac4df3..9b80993 100644
--- a/.github/workflows/conformance-monitor.yml
+++ b/.github/workflows/conformance-monitor.yml
@@ -18,10 +18,10 @@ jobs:
           - guacsec/trustify-ui
           - securesign/rhtas-console-ui
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v7
         with:
           path: template
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v7
         with:
           repository: ${{ matrix.repo }}
           path: ${{ matrix.repo }}
@@ -49,7 +49,7 @@ jobs:
       name: github-pages
       url: ${{ steps.deploy.outputs.page_url }}
     steps:
-      - uses: actions/checkout@v6
+      - uses: actions/checkout@v7
       - uses: actions/setup-node@v6
         with:
           node-version: 22
